issues: Date error: the draft states 'May 11, 1987' as the game date, but the Centennial Cup final was played May 9, 1987 — May 11 is the newspaper publication date, not the game date. The box score headline says 'Championship Final Saturday' (Saturday = May 9).

Shot totals are reversed: the draft says 'Romeo...23' and 'Hoffort...46', but these are shots ON goal, meaning Romeo faced 46 shots (Humboldt outshot Richmond 46-23), not 23. The draft's phrasing implies Romeo had 23 shots, which is misleading.

Goal scorers slightly mis-described: Phillips scored twice (goals 2 and 5) in the first and second periods, plus a third (goal 7) in the third period — Phillips actually scored three goals, not two. The draft says 'Phillips (twice)' but the OCR shows three Richmond goals by Phillips (lines 2, 5, 7).
Headline is slightly paraphrased; actual headline from OCR reads 'Richmond 5 Humboldt 2 Championship Final Saturday'.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Box score of Richmond Sockeyes' 5-2 victory over Humboldt Broncos in the Centennial Cup championship final, played Saturday May 9, 1987.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: Richmond defeated Humboldt 5-2 in the Centennial Cup championship final on Saturday, May 9, 1987 (published May 11). Sockeyes goals came from Tomlinson, Phillips (3), and Rutherford; Humboldt replied with goals from Chamberlin (power play) and Luke. Richmond goaltender Romeo faced 46 shots while Humboldt's Hoffort faced 23; Richmond went 0-for-3 on the power play while Humboldt converted 1 of 5. The box score includes complete period-by-period scoring, penalty details, and shot totals.
review.notes: The game was played Saturday May 9; the paper published Monday May 11. The draft incorrectly used the publication date as the game date. Also note Phillips scored three goals (not two) per the OCR, and shots-on-goal belong to the opposing goaltender (Romeo faced 46, Hoffort faced 23).
